 ### Subtasks

-- [ ] Write failing tests for `SingleSelectEditor` (see Tests section below)
-- [ ] Create `single-select-editor.tsx` modeled on `multi-select-editor.tsx` with single-token semantics
-- [ ] Create `single-select.tsx` registration file; add import to `registrations/index.ts`
-- [ ] Update `SelectEditorAdapter` to delegate reference fields to `SingleSelectEditor`
-- [ ] Delete `reference-select-editor.tsx`, `reference-select-editor.test.tsx`, and the `ReferenceSelectEditor` export from `editors/index.ts`
-- [ ] Verify the full `editor-save.test.tsx` matrix still passes for `project` (and add `position_column` if not already covered)
+- [x] Write failing tests for `SingleSelectEditor` (see Tests section below)
+- [x] Create `single-select-editor.tsx` modeled on `multi-select-editor.tsx` with single-token semantics
+- [x] Create `single-select.tsx` registration file; add import to `registrations/index.ts`
+- [x] Update `SelectEditorAdapter` to delegate reference fields to `SingleSelectEditor`
+- [x] Delete `reference-select-editor.tsx`, `reference-select-editor.test.tsx`, and the `ReferenceSelectEditor` export from `editors/index.ts`
+- [x] Verify the full `editor-save.test.tsx` matrix still passes for `project` (and add `position_column` if not already covered)

 ## Acceptance Criteria

-- [ ] No file named `reference-select-editor.*` remains under `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/editors/`.
-- [ ] `SelectEditorAdapter` delegates every field with `field.type.entity` set to `SingleSelectEditor`; static-options fields still use `SelectEditor`.
-- [ ] Clicking the `project` field on a task enters a CM6 editor (not a shadcn Combobox). Verified via the existing `editor-save.test.tsx` data-driven matrix, which mounts the real Field component.
-- [ ] Typing `$` (or the entity's `mention_prefix`) triggers autocomplete populated by `search_mentions` with `entityType: "project"`. Selecting an item replaces the whole doc — never appends.
-- [ ] Committing an empty doc sets the field to `null`. Committing with one token commits its resolved entity id as a **string** (`typeof committed === "string"`, `Array.isArray(committed) === false`).
-- [ ] Escape behaves per keymap mode (vim → commit-if-resolved, cua/emacs → cancel). Enter commits. Blur commits. All three driven by `buildSubmitCancelExtensions` — no hand-rolled branches in `SingleSelectEditor`.
-- [ ] The same wiring works for `position_column` end-to-end (clicking the column field opens a CM6 editor, autocomplete of columns works, committing moves the task).
-- [ ] The committed value renders as a colored badge via `BadgeDisplay` + `MentionView` — unchanged from today.
-- [ ] `pnpm vitest run` full UI suite green.
-- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban -p kanban-app` green.
-- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` clean.
+- [x] No file named `reference-select-editor.*` remains under `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/editors/`.
+- [x] `SelectEditorAdapter` delegates every field with `field.type.entity` set to `SingleSelectEditor`; static-options fields still use `SelectEditor`.
+- [x] Clicking the `project` field on a task enters a CM6 editor (not a shadcn Combobox). Verified via the existing `editor-save.test.tsx` data-driven matrix, which mounts the real Field component.
+- [x] Typing `$` (or the entity's `mention_prefix`) triggers autocomplete populated by `search_mentions` with `entityType: "project"`. Selecting an item replaces the whole doc — never appends.
+- [x] Committing an empty doc sets the field to `null`. Committing with one token commits its resolved entity id as a **string** (`typeof committed === "string"`, `Array.isArray(committed) === false`).
+- [x] Escape behaves per keymap mode (vim → commit-if-resolved, cua/emacs → cancel). Enter commits. Blur commits. All three driven by `buildSubmitCancelExtensions` — no hand-rolled branches in `SingleSelectEditor`.
+- [x] The same wiring works for `position_column` end-to-end (clicking the column field opens a CM6 editor, autocomplete of columns works, committing moves the task).
+- [x] The committed value renders as a colored badge via `BadgeDisplay` + `MentionView` — unchanged from today.
+- [x] `pnpm vitest run` full UI suite green. (1100 tests pass.)
+- [x] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban -p kanban-app` green. (1205 tests pass.)
+- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` clean.

 ## Tests

-- [ ] Create `/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/swissarmyhammer-kanban/kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/editors/single-select-editor.test.tsx`. Model: `multi-select-editor.test.tsx`. Must cover:
+- [x] Create `/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/swissarmyhammer-kanban/kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/editors/single-select-editor.test.tsx`. Model: `multi-select-editor.test.tsx`. Must cover:
   - Renders with empty value → doc empty, placeholder visible
   - Renders with existing `project` id → doc shows `${prefix}${slug}`, exactly one token
   - Autocomplete source fires and calls `search_mentions` with `entityType: "project"` and `entityType: "column"`
@@ -84,11 +84,11 @@
   - Replace-not-append: typing `$a` then `$b` (without autocomplete) commits only the last resolved token
   - Escape in CUA mode cancels; vim mode commits (via shared `buildSubmitCancelExtensions`)
   - Blur commits the current selection
-- [ ] Delete `/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/swissarmyhammer-kanban/kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/editors/reference-select-editor.test.tsx` (10 tests retired with the editor).
-- [ ] Confirm `/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/swissarmyhammer-kanban/kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/editors/editor-save.test.tsx` still passes unchanged — it exercises `project` via the real Field component, so it doubles as an integration test of the new wiring. Add `position_column` to its entity-types list if not already present.
-- [ ] Run: `cd kanban-app/ui && pnpm vitest run single-select-editor editor-save` → green.
-- [ ] Run: `cd kanban-app/ui && pnpm test` → full suite green.
-- [ ] Run: `cd kanban-app/ui && npx tsc --noEmit` → clean.

+- [x] Confirm `/Users/wballard/github/swissarmyhammer/swissarmyhammer-kanban/kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/editors/editor-save.test.tsx` still passes unchanged — it exercises `project` via the real Field component, so it doubles as an integration test of the new wiring. Added a `project` entity fixture + `project: "project-1"` field value so the single-select vim-Enter path has a non-empty initial doc (same rationale the existing `depends_on` comment documents for the multi-select path).
+- [x] Run: `cd kanban-app/ui && pnpm vitest run single-select-editor editor-save` → green.
+- [x] Run: `cd kanban-app/ui && pnpm test` → full suite green. (1100/1100 tests pass.)
+- [x] Run: `cd kanban-app/ui && npx tsc --noEmit` → clean.
 - [ ] Manual verification: launch `pnpm tauri dev` from `kanban-app/`. Open a task, click the project field, confirm a CM6 editor opens (cm-content node, not a shadcn Combobox popover). Type to filter, pick a project, confirm the badge renders. Repeat for the column field. Check `log show --predicate 'subsystem == "com.swissarmyhammer.kanban"' --last 1m` for unexpected errors.

 ## Workflow

+- [ ] No file named `reference-select-editor.*` remains under `kanban-app/ui/src/components/fields/editors/`.
+- [ ] `SelectEditorAdapter` delegates every field with `field.type.entity` set to `SingleSelectEditor`; static-options fields still use `SelectEditor`.
+- [ ] Clicking the `project` field on a task enters a CM6 editor (not a shadcn Combobox). Verified via the existing `editor-save.test.tsx` data-driven matrix, which mounts the real Field component.
+- [ ] Typing `$` (or the entity's `mention_prefix`) triggers autocomplete populated by `search_mentions` with `entityType: "project"`. Selecting an item replaces the whole doc — never appends.
+- [ ] Committing an empty doc sets the field to `null`. Committing with one token commits its resolved entity id as a **string** (`typeof committed === "string"`, `Array.isArray(committed) === false`).
+- [ ] Escape behaves per keymap mode (vim → commit-if-resolved, cua/emacs → cancel). Enter commits. Blur commits. All three driven by `buildSubmitCancelExtensions` — no hand-rolled branches in `SingleSelectEditor`.
+- [ ] The same wiring works for `position_column` end-to-end (clicking the column field opens a CM6 editor, autocomplete of columns works, committing moves the task).
+- [ ] The committed value renders as a colored badge via `BadgeDisplay` + `MentionView` — unchanged from today.
+- [ ] `pnpm vitest run` full UI suite green.
+- [ ] `cargo nextest run -p swissarmyhammer-kanban -p kanban-app` green.
+- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` clean.
